methodology_notes: Commands were executed manually by the evaluator, NOT by a separate agent instance.

assertions.description: Both a before and after screenshot file were committed for the affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: Files before-copilot-adopt.png (66201 bytes) and after-copilot-adopt.png (65999 bytes) were created locally. The git commit step was NOT executed.

assertions.description: The before screenshot was taken before changes and the after screenshot after changes
assertions.evidence: Commands were run in sequence (before then after), but no actual dashboard change was made between screenshots. The test simulated a change without modifying dashboard JSON.

assertions.description: Screenshot file names clearly distinguish before vs after
Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded
assertions.evidence: Screenshots were taken from a real Grafana instance. Visual inspection was not performed to verify panel content.

notes: Manual command execution. No actual dashboard changes were applied between before/after screenshots.
